violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Store raw meats according to cook temperatures in refrigerator. Store raw meats below and away from ready to eat foods in refrigerator.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Date marking of prepared items not accomplished. Date mark purchased salads etc. when packages are opened. Product has 10 days after opening.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed. Defrost reach in freezers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. Vinegar and water solution used in sanitizing tub of 3 tub sink system.
Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet as required. Utility sink hose not protected with back flow prevention.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employees unable to wash hands as necessary. Water not provided at sinks.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Hood not provided for equipment.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory did not have a mixing valve or combination faucet. Operator didn't fill water tank before event. Hand sink inoperable.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
